title: Python impl: Yggdrasil address as primary
description:
## Overview

Update Python implementation to use Yggdrasil-derived 02xx addresses as primary.

## Changes

### Address derivation (lichen/crypto/identity.py or similar)
- Add: derive_yggdrasil_address(pubkey) → 02xx address
- Use same Ed25519 key as existing identity

### Node addressing (lichen/node.py or similar)
- Remove: ULA address assignment
- Add: Yggdrasil address from identity
- Keep: link-local for control plane

### Routing (lichen/routing/ or similar)
- Update destination checks:
  - link-local → neighbor
  - 02xx + in local mesh → mesh routing
  - 02xx + not local → Yggdrasil (gateway)
  - other → backhaul

### Simulator
- Update simulated nodes to use 02xx addresses
- Remove ULA prefix configuration

## Tests
- Test Yggdrasil address derivation matches reference
- Test local routing with 02xx addresses
- Test routing decision: local vs remote 02xx
close_reason: Yggdrasil 02xx derivation implemented+tested bit-exact across Rust/C/Python. ULA removed, node addressing/routing/Kconfig updated. 3 codereview passes per lang completed. Cargo test, pytest, west native_sim all PASS. No ULA remnants.
